intendedOperatingEnvironment.supervision: adult supervision assumed at all times; not a standalone toy

flash.provenance: estimate:engineering (module family knowledge; datasheet not in corpus)

controller.firmware: local-only; Wi-Fi/BLE disabled in v0.1 profile

adcResolutionBits.provenance: estimate:engineering (ESP32-C3 family; datasheet not in corpus)

adcMaxInputVoltage.provenance: estimate:engineering (11 dB attenuation envelope; datasheet not in corpus)

programCurrent.provenance: estimate:engineering (Rprog selection; datasheet not in corpus)

charger.loadSharing: required; P-MOSFET power-path circuit is an explicit implementation obligation, not assumed from the module
charger.usbCcPulldowns: required 5.1 kOhm on both CC pins; not assumed from the module

rails.name: VBAT_SW
rails.source: battery via power switch and PPTC

ledPolicy.singleBayStrobePolicy: only one bay illuminated during a classification strobe

power.exposedConductorPolicy: no user-accessible unsafe power conductors; external contacts limited to USB-C receptacle and recessed PPTC-protected daughterboard connector

opticalTokenSystem.illumination: one WS2812B-class addressable RGB emitter per bay on a single shared data line (GPIO10)
opticalTokenSystem.detector: one LDR per bay, resistive divider into ADC1

tokenFormat.body: passive 3D-printed token, tactile + textual top markings
tokenFormat.machineReadableRegion: recessed color region facing well floor

opticalTokenSystem.classifier: deterministic nearest-centroid over dark-subtracted normalized RGB strobe responses; no machine learning
opticalTokenSystem.calibration: per-device ambient + dark calibration routine required

writingSlate.type: self-contained 8.5-inch monochrome pressure-LCD writing tablet module
writingSlate.integration: mechanical docking only; no electrical connection in v0.1

widthNominal.provenance: estimate:engineering (common 8.5-inch tablet module; datasheet not in corpus)

humanInterface.templateArea: backlit translucent PETG diffuser; teacher-selected paper or plastic lesson sheets

materials.structural: matte black PETG (PLA only with thermal-creep warning)

mechanical.fasteners: M3 thread-forming screws into printed bosses (boss OD 7 mm, pilot 2.5 mm)
mechanical.wiring: snap-fit internal wiring channels, groove width 2.4 mm, insulated conductors only
mechanical.carryStrap: two printed strap anchors; load rating requires_validation
mechanical.bareConductorPolicy: bare copper prohibited outside sealed electronics bay

daughterboardInterface.connector: 2x6 2.54 mm shrouded keyed header, recessed pocket, asymmetric key post

knownExclusions: no cloud services or companion-app requirement
no toy-safety certification claim (IS 9873 / EN 71 / IEC 62115)
no classroom-safety or child-safety claim without physical evidence
no drop-rating claim before controlled drop testing
no Wi-Fi/BLE features in v0.1 firmware profile
safetyAssumptions: battery is a protected cell; protection PCB behavior not yet bench-verified
charging only with the console on a desk, not inside a bag
tokens are large enough (30 mm) to reduce swallowing risk for the intended age group; NOT verified against small-parts cylinder testing
all conductors insulated and enclosed; service panel requires a tool to open
unresolvedDecisions: final TP4056-class charger implementation satisfying DEC-002 conditions
heat-set inserts vs thread-forming screws for high-cycle bosses
strap-anchor load rating (blocked on physical load test)
exact LDR part and divider value after optical bench calibration
final battery vendor and protected-cell certification evidence
